{{Infobox group
| name = Consultants
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Consultants Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Consultants are a highly efficient and widespread [[Guild]] known for providing expert advice, information, and strategic support to clients. While they are primarily viewed as advisors capable of answering any question or assisting with business and military matters, they possess significant resources and a reputation for being an unstoppable force in sabotage and information manipulation. They are famously dedicated to the [[Empire]] and [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]], maintaining a long-standing reputation for absolute loyalty that has earned them imperial trust for centuries. This commitment is driven by their adherence to contracts and the belief that a strong [[Empire]] benefits their prosperity. [[The Guild]] is organized into several specialized orders. [[Shepherds]] focus on observation and scouting through rigorous training in infiltration and memory, while [[Miners]] serve as archivists who maintain the [[Guild]]'s vast records. Other roles include [[Masons]], who specialize in undercover work, and [[Gardeners]], who are tasked with removing threats. The [[Council of Architects]] serves as the ruling body, consisting of diverse talents such as strategists, administrators, and alchemists. Although they are not officially assassins or hired killers, the Consultants are capable of lethal combat and have been linked to the deaths of powerful figures like [[Champions]]. They operate with extreme discretion, often masking their true activities from clients to maintain a specific perception of their work.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Consultants are a group, including [[Shera]], that can be hired for business assistance or advice but never work alone. Dressed in black outfits, these individuals maintain a presence on [[Gray Island]] and operate a comfortable prison where they perform thorough inspections of possessions. While they do not employ hired killers, they may kill [[Naberius]] and have engaged in combat with their enemy, [[Urzaia]]. Though they might work under the influence of the [[Elders]], the group prefers a world without an [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]], yet they view total anarchy as a dangerous haven for assassins and spies. During a confrontation in an [[arena]], three Consultants faced [[Calder]], who hoped the group would perish fighting the [[Handmaiden]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">17</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] are a group that can be hired for advice or business assistance.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] are a group that includes [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Consultants]] do not work on their own.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] run a comfortable prison.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia]] fought with the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] would prefer to have no [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] view a world of anarchy as a haven for spies and assassins.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] are a group that may work under the influence of the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] are enemies of [[Urzaia]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Consultants]] perform thorough inspections of possessions.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] have a presence on [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] wear black outfits.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] do not employ hired killers.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] might kill [[Naberius]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|There are three [[Consultants]] facing [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|There are three [[Consultants]] in the [[arena]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] hopes the [[Handmaiden]] and the [[Consultants]] will kill each other.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Consultants are a group of two thousand individuals living on the [[Gray Island]], identified by their Gardening Shears crest and an order of assassins. While [[Maxwell]] believes [[Shera]] can compete with them, the group is known to win regardless of which side loses in conflicts and has been known to attack [[Blackwatch]] operations. Members such as [[Meia]], who was raised among them, and [[Lucan]] maintain archives and possess well-known knowledge of the entrance to [[Zhen]]’s [[House of the Masons]]. After being hired by local leaders to investigate disappearances, the group gathered at the docks outside [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]] and eventually caught up with [[Shera]]. Despite their legendary status among figures like [[Yala]], the group suffered heavy losses during a mission where only twenty-four of sixty-one members survived, and they faced being forced to betray their cause through the use of the [[Emperor's crown]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">22</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] are a group that [[Maxwell]] believes [[Shera]] can compete with.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] are a group that performed work on [[Ulrich Fletcher]]'s [[workshop]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Consultants]] are a group that [[Naberius]] was able to shake with ease.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] had very little information on [[Jyrine Tessella Marten]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|There are two thousand [[Consultants]] living on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] was born and raised among [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Consultants]] are a group that [[Meia]] believes in.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Consultants]] gathered on the dock outside [[Bastion]]’s [[Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] have an order of assassins.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Jyrine]] was positioned between two [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] are a group that wins regardless of which side loses in conflicts.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] suffered heavy losses during the mission, with only twenty-four remaining out of sixty-one.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Consultants]] are a group that [[Yala]] is legendary among.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The entrance to [[Zhen]]’s [[House of the Masons]] is well-known to all [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] were hired by a local governor and mayors to investigate disappearances.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] maintain archives.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Consultants]] have been known to attack [[Blackwatch]] operations.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The hall was filled with [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Consultants]] are being forced to betray their cause using the [[Emperor's crown]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] caught up with [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] include [[Meia]] and [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] crest is the Gardening Shears.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|First mentioned by [[Cheska]], the Consultants are an [[Imperial]] [[Guild]] that functions as a member of the Independent alliance. The group claims responsibility for the death of [[Nakothi]]’s [[Handmaiden]]. In their operations, they permit [[Navigators]] to establish settlements and transport payloads of soldiers. Despite these capabilities, the Consultants eventually suffered a loss in battle.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Cheska]] mentions [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Consultants]] are part of the Independent alliance.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Consultants]] claim to have killed [[Nakothi]]’s [[Handmaiden]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Consultants]] are an [[Imperial]] [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Consultants]] allow [[Navigators]] to settle in and deliver payloads of soldiers.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Consultants]] lost a battle.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Recognized as the [[Empire]]'s most dedicated servants, the Consultants are one of three [[Guilds]] that elect their leaders by bonding to a [[Vessel]]. This group, which includes the [[Gardeners]], is present on the [[island]]'s terrain and maintains an alliance with the Luminians. While they stand to benefit from [[Loreli]] serving as [[Regent]], their true motives remain private, though they seek to hasten [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] toward his death. Although [[Maxwell]] trained [[Benji]] and others to emulate their conduct, [[Lucan]] intends to press the group for change as they prepare for war. Ultimately, the Consultants vanished alongside [[Yala]] and several former prisoners in red suits, later dropping to one knee while murmuring the title of [[Guild Head]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">13</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Gardeners]] are part of the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Consultants]] are present on the terrain of the [[island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] are known as the [[Empire]]'s most dedicated servants.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] are a group that could benefit from [[Loreli]] being [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] are allies of the Luminians.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] is a group [[Lucan]] wishes to press for change in.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] want to speed [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] on his way to the grave.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] were preparing for war.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Consultants]] are individuals whom [[Benji]] and others were taught to act like by [[Maxwell]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Consultants]] have private reasons.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] vanished along with [[Yala]] and the red-suited former prisoners.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] are one of three [[Guilds]] that elect heads by bonding to a [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] dropped to one knee and murmured '[[Guild Head]]'.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|As one of the four [[Independent Guilds]], the Consultants are a group that includes [[Meia]] and once maintained a former headquarters. [[Calder]] identifies them as playing a vital support role, noting their vast store of strange knowledge and rumors that they are everywhere and know everything. During an interrogation involving the use of [[alchemy]], members of the group were seen using crowbars to pry a plate from [[Calder]]'s back, leading to suspicions that they attempted to kill him. Although the group possesses the ship [[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]] and is mentioned by [[Andel]], [[Calder]] remains unable to determine their current location.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Consultants]] had a former headquarters.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Consultants]] are one of the four [[Independent Guilds]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Consultants]] are one of the [[Guilds]] [[Calder]] mentions as playing a vital support role.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Consultants]] possess a vast store of strange knowledge.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Consultants]] are suspected of trying to kill [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Consultants]] are rumored to be everywhere and know everything.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Consultants]] were prying the plate from [[Calder]]'s back using crowbars.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Consultants]] use [[alchemy]] during interrogations.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Consultants]] are a group that includes [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Consultants]] are a group that possesses the ship [[Bastion]]’s [[Shadow]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Consultants]] are a group that [[Andel]] mentions.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] does not know where the [[Consultants]] are.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|An exiled group that has nearly doubled in size over the last two years, the Consultants provide vital support by offering security from the shadows. While they are not true killers and are sometimes viewed as servants by their clients, tens of thousands of people have competed to hire them following the death of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]. Team leaders use invested whistles to signal the group, who possess the ability to hear a winter-feather robin whistle as deafeningly loud. During recent conflicts, the group secured exits around the [[Rose Tower]] and even ambushed [[Lucan]] and [[Shera]] from within crates. Despite their effectiveness, [[Calder Marten]] recognizes them as a potential threat, and [[Shera]] struggled with insufficient numbers to secure their location while contemplating the group's casualties.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">19</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Consultants]] are an exiled group.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Consultants]] provide security from the shadows.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Consultants]] can hear the cry of a winter-feather robin whistle as deafeningly loud.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Team leaders are given invested whistles to signal [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Consultants]] are not true killers.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Tens of thousands of people are out-bidding one another to hire [[Consultants]] due to the chaos following [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s death.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Consultants]] secured exits around the [[Rose Tower]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Consultants]] are a group that [[Calder Marten]] recognizes as a potential threat.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Consultants]] play a vital support role.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Two [[Consultants]] flowed through the ordinary [[Guild]] members like shadows.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Consultants]] have nearly doubled in size over the last two years.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Mistress of the Mists]] saw [[Shera]] as a potential [[Guild Head]] for the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] prepared letters for a select few other [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Consultants]] would be giving up power by raising the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Consultants]] are sometimes viewed as servants by their clients.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Consultants]] hid in crates to ambush [[Lucan]] and [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] had not brought enough [[Consultants]] to secure the place.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] wondered how many [[Consultants]] had died.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] would have to apologize to the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Yeah, I’d put that together too. Everybody wants me to take care of the other Guilds, like I can tell the Consultants how to do their jobs.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“You know, speaking of your death, I don’t see the Consultants around here.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Upon induction into the Consultants, each Gardener was given a pair of “shears”<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|One by one, the Consultants dropped to a knee. “Guild Head,” they murmured. “Guild Head.”<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“We also need guarantees that your Guilds will continue to work together with ours. The Consultants and the alchemists especially play a vital support role, without which some of the other Guilds will cease to function.”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
